reasoning: Experience: 14+ years of software development experience, exceeding the 6+ years requirement. Most recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) are senior-level, with direct full-stack responsibilities.
Stack Match: Primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) aligns well with required technologies. Secondary stack (Java, Kotlin) is present but not heavily emphasized in recent roles.
Full-Stack Coverage: Recent roles involve both frontend (React) and backend (Node.js, TypeScript, Nest.js-like frameworks) development, matching the job's end-to-end feature requirement.
AI Agent Experience: Current role at re:cinq explicitly mentions AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows), which directly matches the required AI agent development skill.
Architecture & Scalability: Roles at Dunnhumby (low-latency micro-services) and GISCollective (Kubernetes deployment) demonstrate architecture, scalability, and performance optimization experience.
Testing: Mentions Vitest (primary stack) and Jest (testing framework expertise requirement), plus TDD practices in previous roles.
Cloud & DevOps: Experience with AWS CDK (Optilyz), Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective, Altom), and CI/CD (RIDE Capital) covers cloud and containerization requirements.
Database Experience: MongoDB (Optilyz), PostgreSQL/MySQL (Altom, GISCollective), and Dlang databases (Dunnhumby) cover relational/NoSQL requirements.
Security & Auth: Not explicitly mentioned in resume, but general software security practices may be implied through TDD and CI/CD roles.
Communication & Collaboration: Roles involve teamwork (Pairing, TDD at RIDE), teaching (workshops), and open-source contributions (GISCollective), aligning with core qualifications.
Education: Bachelor's in Computer Science meets the degree requirement.

Potential Gaps: Primary stack lacks explicit Nest.js mention (though similar frameworks like Fastify/Express are present), and Kotlin/Java are not recent focuses despite being secondary stack requirements.
strengths: 14+ years of senior-level full-stack development experience with direct responsibility for end-to-end features
Strong alignment with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) and recent AI agent infrastructure experience
Proven architecture, scalability, and performance optimization skills across multiple domains and technologies
concerns: Secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) lacks recent emphasis in current roles, despite being a required secondary technology
Primary stack lacks explicit Nest.js experience, though similar frameworks (Fastify/Express) are present
Security/authentication best practices are not explicitly highlighted in the resume
response.justification: Bogdan's extensive senior-level experience (14+ years) and strong alignment with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) make him an excellent fit for the role. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure directly addresses a key requirement. Minor gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin/Java recency are outweighed by his breadth of experience and proven architecture skills. Security/authentication expertise is implied but not explicitly stated.
